name: Module Registry
description: Manages logical modules that group related features together, supporting module-level navigation, feature membership inference, and module-aware context building.

Models/ModuleEntry.cs.content:
class ModuleEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  FeatureIds: List<string>
  Keywords: List<string>
  LastUpdatedAt: DateTime
class ModuleIndex
  Version: int
  Modules: List<ModuleIndexEntry>
class ModuleIndexEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  FeatureIds: List<string>

dependencies: Consumed by FeatureRegistryManager for module context
